untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of confluence between daily pivot (S1) and weekly support pivot level. The allowed pivot indicator only provides single timeframe pivots (pivot, r1, s1, r2, s2). Weekly pivot detection and multi-timeframe confluence matching are not supported by the available indicator set. 'Proximity definition' and exact 'magnitude of correction' parameters are also marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: entry when S1 crosses below (interpreted as breakdown of support level), exit on recovery above S1. However, the core logic—detecting when a daily S1 confluences with a weekly support pivot—cannot be properly expressed without multi-timeframe pivot calculations not present in the allowed indicators.
